mapper.select: select id, name, item_type, item_id, url from graph_info where is_deleted = 0 and item_type = 2 and item_id = #{id}
select id, type, name from label_info where is_deleted = 0 and id in (select label_id from room_label where is_deleted = 0 and room_id = #{id})
select min(rent) from room_info where is_deleted = 0 and is_release = 1 and apartment_id = #{id}

select ri.id, ri.room_number, ri.rent, ai.id apartment_id, ai.name, ai.introduction, ai.district_id, ai.district_name, ai.city_id, ai.city_name, ai.province_id, ai.province_name, ai.address_detail, ai.latitude, ai.longitude, ai.phone, ai.is_release from room_info ri left join apartment_info ai on ri.apartment_id = ai.id and ai.is_deleted = 0 where ri.apartment_id = #{id}
and ri.is_deleted = 0 and ri.is_release = 1 and ri.id not in (select room_id from lease_agreement where is_deleted = 0 and status in (2, 5))
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO graph_info (name, item_type, item_id, url, create_time, update_time) VALUES
(#{graph.name}, 2, #{roomId}, #{graph.url}, NOW(), NOW())

INSERT INTO room_attr_value (room_id, attr_value_id, is_deleted, create_time, update_time) VALUES
(#{roomId}, #{attrValueId}, 0, NOW(), NOW())

INSERT INTO room_facility (room_id, facility_id, is_deleted, create_time, update_time) VALUES
(#{roomId}, #{facilityId}, 0, NOW(), NOW())

INSERT INTO room_label (room_id, label_id, is_deleted, create_time, update_time) VALUES
(#{roomId}, #{labelId}, 0, NOW(), NOW())

INSERT INTO room_payment_type (room_id, payment_type_id, is_deleted, create_time, update_time) VALUES
(#{roomId}, #{paymentTypeId}, 0, NOW(), NOW())

INSERT INTO room_lease_term (room_id, lease_term_id, is_deleted, create_time, update_time) VALUES
(#{roomId}, #{leaseTermId}, 0, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT ri.id, ri.room_number, ri.rent, ri.apartment_id, ai.name as apartment_name, ai.introduction as apartment_introduction, ai.address_detail as apartment_address, ai.phone as apartment_phone, ri.publisher_type, ri.publisher_id, ri.is_release, ri.review_status, ri.compliance_score, ri.last_reviewed_at, ri.create_time, ri.update_time FROM room_info ri LEFT JOIN apartment_info ai ON ri.apartment_id = ai.id WHERE ri.id = #{roomId} AND ri.is_deleted = 0

SELECT av.id, av.name, av.attr_key_id, ak.name as attr_key_name FROM room_attr_value rav LEFT JOIN attr_value av ON rav.attr_value_id = av.id LEFT JOIN attr_key ak ON av.attr_key_id = ak.id WHERE rav.room_id = #{roomId} AND rav.is_deleted = 0 AND av.is_deleted = 0 AND ak.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY ak.id, av.id

SELECT rr.id, rr.room_id, rr.apartment_id, rr.landlord_id, rr.reviewer_id, rr.status, rr.compliance_score, rr.photo_quality_score, rr.description_accuracy_score, rr.facility_completeness_score, rr.location_accuracy_score, rr.overall_rating, rr.review_comments, rr.rejection_reasons, rr.reviewed_at, rr.create_time, rr.update_time, su.name as reviewer_name FROM room_review rr LEFT JOIN system_user su ON rr.reviewer_id = su.id WHERE rr.room_id = #{roomId} AND rr.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY rr.create_time DESC LIMIT 1
